assignments.twist: birth-death master equation for reaction schemes whose mean-field limit is the Verhulst logistic equation, analyzed for extinction via spectral/WKB methods
logistic (Verhulst) equation recovered as the deterministic mean-field limit of the microscopic stochastic birth-death process

core_model_summary: A microscopic birth-death stochastic process (chemical master equation) for population reactions whose deterministic mean-field limit is the logistic Verhulst growth equation, with extinction times obtained via spectral and WKB analysis.
